description: William clicks on the Google search bar to begin his search.
page_title: Google
frame_description: The Google search homepage is visible with a clean white background and the search bar in the center.

description: A dropdown menu with trending searches appears below the search bar.
page_title: Google
frame_description: A list of trending search terms has appeared in a dropdown menu beneath the search input field.

description: William types 'expedia' into the search bar.
page_title: Google
frame_description: The word 'expedia' is being entered into the search bar, replacing the trending searches list with autocomplete suggestions.

description: Google's autocomplete suggestions appear as William types.
page_title: Google
frame_description: A list of search suggestions related to 'expedia' is displayed below the search bar.

description: William clicks the search icon to execute the search.
page_title: Google
frame_description: The cursor activates the search icon at the right end of the search bar.

description: The browser navigates to the Google search results page for 'expedia'.
page_title: expedia - Google Search
frame_description: The page content refreshes to show a list of search results for the query 'expedia'.

description: William hovers over the first search result for the official Expedia website.
page_title: expedia - Google Search
frame_description: The cursor lingers over the main link of the first search result, which points to expedia.com.au.

description: William clicks on the Expedia website link.
page_title: expedia - Google Search
frame_description: The user activates the link to the Expedia website.

description: The browser navigates to the Expedia homepage.
page_title: Travel with Expedia: Holiday Homes, Hotels, Flights & More
frame_description: The Expedia homepage loads, displaying a large search widget with several travel category tabs.

description: William hovers over the 'Packages' tab in the travel search widget.
page_title: Travel with Expedia: Holiday Homes, Hotels, Flights & More
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Packages' icon in the horizontal menu of the search widget.

description: William clicks on the 'Packages' tab to search for flight + hotel deals.
page_title: Travel with Expedia: Holiday Homes, Hotels, Flights & More
frame_description: The user selects the Packages search mode.

description: The search widget updates to show fields relevant to package searches.
page_title: Travel with Expedia: Holiday Homes, Hotels, Flights & More
frame_description: The input fields within the search widget change to accommodate origin, destination, and date selections for a package.

description: William hovers over the 'Going to' destination input field.
page_title: Travel with Expedia: Holiday Homes, Hotels, Flights & More
frame_description: The cursor rests over the destination input box while the user considers their entry.

description: William clicks into the 'Going to' field to enter his destination.
page_title: Travel with Expedia: Holiday Homes, Hotels, Flights & More
frame_description: The destination input field is activated for text entry.

description: A destination selection dropdown appears.
page_title: Travel with Expedia: Holiday Homes, Hotels, Flights & More
frame_description: An empty dropdown menu appears below the 'Going to' field, ready for search results.

description: William types 'lond' into the destination field.
page_title: Travel with Expedia: Holiday Homes, Hotels, Flights & More
frame_description: The characters 'lond' appear in the destination input box.

description: A list of matching destinations appears.
page_title: Travel with Expedia: Holiday Homes, Hotels, Flights & More
frame_description: The dropdown menu populates with various London-related locations and airports.

description: William hovers over the 'London (LHR - Heathrow)' option in the suggestions list.
page_title: Travel with Expedia: Holiday Homes, Hotels, Flights & More
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the Heathrow airport suggestion in the dropdown list.

description: William selects 'London (LHR - Heathrow)' from the list of suggested destinations.
page_title: Travel with Expedia: Holiday Homes, Hotels, Flights & More
frame_description: The user clicks on the Heathrow airport option to set it as the destination.

description: The destination is selected and the dropdown menu closes.
page_title: Travel with Expedia: Holiday Homes, Hotels, Flights & More
frame_description: The dropdown menu disappears and the 'Going to' field now displays 'London (LHR - Heathrow)'.

description: William selects the 'I only need accommodation for part of my trip' checkbox.
interaction_target: I only need accommodation for part of my trip checkbox
page_title: Travel with Expedia: Holiday Homes, Hotels, Flights & More
frame_description: The user clicks on the checkbox located below the main search fields.

description: The checkbox is toggled and additional date selection fields appear for the accommodation period.
page_title: Travel with Expedia: Holiday Homes, Hotels, Flights & More
frame_description: The form expands to show new date inputs specifically for the hotel stay portion of the package.

description: William hovers over the 'Search' button.
page_title: Travel with Expedia: Holiday Homes, Hotels, Flights & More
frame_description: The cursor is placed over the blue 'Search' button on the right side of the widget.

description: William clicks the 'Search' button to find travel packages.
page_title: Travel with Expedia: Holiday Homes, Hotels, Flights & More
frame_description: The user initiates the search for flight and hotel packages.

description: The browser begins navigating to the search results page.
page_title: Travel with Expedia: Holiday Homes, Hotels, Flights & More
frame_description: The current page content begins to unload as the search request is processed.

description: An Expedia loading screen with a spinner appears while results are being fetched.
page_title: Travel with Expedia: Holiday Homes, Hotels, Flights & More
frame_description: A white loading screen with the Expedia logo and a blue progress spinner is displayed.
